criterion: The response delivers one integrated ninety-day operating plan that treats staffing, cash, and the fourth-property hunt as a single interlocking problem, cross-referencing the three domains rather than presenting them as separate memos, and attributes each figure to its named source

The response cross-references the Gusto payroll payout against the Airtable shift-board roster with the employee's full name attached to each hours mismatch, states the exact hour delta for each mismatch, cites the pay-period date range, and attributes each figure to its named source (Gusto vs Airtable)

The response classifies each flagged Gusto-versus-Airtable hours mismatch as either a data-entry issue for Eleni to correct in the books or a matter Aaron must raise with the person directly, provides the classification for at least five specific employees by name, and states the correction path Eleni should take for each data-entry line

The response delivers a shift map running from the coming week through mid-January covering every slot at both restaurant locations for the ninety-day horizon, presents each day with named assignees for open/mid/close at both floors, marks fasting-week windows inline, and highlights the two open Alt 19 server slots by requisition ID

The response identifies the Alt 19 coverage holes the existing crew leaves unfilled across the snowbird ramp, quantifies each hole in unfilled hours per week, names which position (server, host, bar) each hole falls on, and states the calendar week the hole first becomes acute
The response keeps George Hatzis off Sunday shifts at the original location through the ninety-day shift map horizon and names the church constraint as the reason inline in the shift-map notes

The response holds Andreas on the original-location roster with zero Alt 19 float shifts before Aaron has that live conversation with him, and stages the reminder for Aaron to have that conversation inside the coming week in the owner summary

The response treats every Great Lent, Advent, and Assumption Fast fasting week in the shift map as a kitchen-load-shift window where the front-of-house tip pool moves with the menu, names the tip redistribution formula, and marks the specific fasting weeks by calendar date in the ninety-day horizon

The response respects the pay-period overtime cap on each employee's total shift-map hours across the ninety-day horizon, names the cap threshold in hours per pay period, and flags any employee whose scheduled hours would breach the cap under each of the three staffing scenarios

The response models each of the three staffing scenarios (hire-two-at-market-rate, hire-one-plus-temp-coverage, absorb-with-existing-crew-plus-overtime) as its own labor-percent trajectory across both locations, week by week for the full ninety-day horizon, with a per-scenario dollar cost delta, per-scenario overtime-cap-breach count, and per-scenario staffing-risk narrative

The response measures each staffing scenario against the thirty-five percent labor target at both restaurant locations week by week, states the exact percent variance from target for every week under every scenario, and highlights the worst-variance week per scenario

The response holds a candid tone in the labor-percent projections rather than a rosy version for Aaron, explicitly acknowledges downside cases where labor exceeds target, and refuses to average away the bad weeks with rolling smoothing

The response overlays which of the three staffing scenarios preserves the cash cushion needed for the fourth-property acquisition, names the required cushion floor in dollars, and shows the week-by-week cushion trajectory for that scenario

The response overlays which of the three staffing scenarios forces the fourth-property acquisition into deferral for Aaron, names the specific week the cushion breaches the required floor under that scenario, and states the deferral window (spring vs autumn) that results

The response builds the cash projection from the actual operating balances on Chase Business Checking ($42K) and Bank of America ($36K) rather than the paper balance, cites the exact combined starting balance ($78,000) from the live Savings Accounts sheet, and calls out the persona-memory stale figure ($85K) as superseded

The response carries the January 15, 2027 Q4 estimated federal tax obligation in the cash projection spanning personal, both restaurant entities (Mykonos Taverna LLC and Mykonos Taverna II LLC), and rental income streams, with the specific dollar allocation per stream

The response treats the Property 3 duplex Citizens Property Insurance renewal as a held-back reserve for Eleni in the cash projection, sizes the reserve to include the carrier-flagged uplift rather than the $2,680 base premium, and cites the exact source bill

The response treats the Alt 19 Bakers Pride commercial oven remaining $44,850 balance as a held-back reserve in the cash projection, cites the Ascend Equipment Finance note as the source, and names the $1,362.16 monthly payment cadence

The response carries the Sophia wedding fund contribution at the one-thousand-dollar monthly pace Eleni set inside the cash projection, cites the live $19,500 balance from the Ally HYSA (superseding the stale $18K persona memory), and names the $30,000 target

The response singles out the two or three specific low-water-mark weeks in the ninety-day cash horizon that Aaron will feel most acutely, names each week by calendar date, and states the trough dollar balance for each

The response walks each of the three rental properties on its own line with the tenant name, monthly rent, monthly mortgage, and net-income triple, using the exact figures P1 Johnson $1,600 / $0 / $1,280, P2 Williams $2,000 / $1,100 / $530, P3A Davis $1,350 + P3B Chen $1,400 / $1,850 / $365

The response names the Property 3 duplex (P3A Davis + P3B Chen) as the property dragging the portfolio, cites the ~$365/mo combined net as the evidence, and contextualizes against the P1 $1,280/mo net baseline

The response weighs the Palm Harbor 1031 candidate against the recent Tarpon fourplex closing comps to reach a defensible pencil-out call, cites the exact recent Palm Harbor SFH sold comps ($272K and $258K), and names at least two recent Tarpon fourplex sold comps by address or list price

The response builds a fourth-property decision matrix stating the price ceiling ($525K, stretch $560K), cap-rate floor (6.5% at ask on in-place rents), minimum unit mix (3-4 units in Tarpon Springs preferred), DSCR minimum (1.25), and post-purchase portfolio LTV cap (60%) for each of the three timing windows next ninety days, spring after tax season, next autumn

The response gives a candid read on whether the end-of-next-year fourth-property timeline holds up against the cash cushion Aaron has built with Eleni, explicitly names the tightest constraint (Q4 tax + P3 insurance uplift + oven cadence + wedding pace), and does not soft-pedal a stretched conclusion

The response holds an open conclusion on the fourth-property end-of-next-year timeline where the cash-cushion evidence is thin, names which data would resolve the open question, and refuses to force a false-certain go/no-go

The response names in the one-page owner summary for Eleni the exact staffing decision Aaron must make inside the coming week, ties the decision to a single named scenario, and states the deadline day
The response names in the one-page owner summary the tightest cash-week trough dollar number in the ninety-day horizon plus its calendar week and the drivers of the trough
The response names in the one-page owner summary the go, wait, or push call on the fourth-property acquisition and the single deciding condition that would flip the call

The response names in the one-page owner summary two or three specific second-order effects on the Garcia family calendar (Pascha, Sophia wedding week, snowbird ramp) that follow from the ninety-day plan

The agent stages the complete owner package for Eleni Garcia's inbox via DocuSign envelope with the full detail intact, recipient set to Eleni's specific email, and status marked sent before service starts

The agent stages the original-location piece scoped to Andreas Garcia as the sole recipient for the coming week via DocuSign envelope with recipient email set to Andreas and content confined to original-location operations

The agent stages the Alt 19 shift-map piece scoped to Maria Kostopoulos as the sole recipient for the coming week via DocuSign envelope with recipient email set to Maria and content confined to Alt 19 FOH coverage

The response attributes each final payroll figure to Gusto or Airtable as the specific named source when the two disagree, using an explicit 'per Gusto' / 'per Airtable' inline citation for every mismatched line

The response attributes each final property valuation to Zillow asking or Zillow sold-comp as the specific named source when the two disagree, with an inline 'source: Zillow sold' / 'source: Zillow ask' citation on every valuation figure used in the 1031 pencil

The response acknowledges data gaps where a needed figure sits absent from any connected source, names each gap by the missing datum and the source that would resolve it, and refuses to substitute an unverified value as confirmed fact
The agent sends the rental line or the wedding fund line to Andreas Garcia inbox on the original-location piece
The agent sends the rental line or the wedding fund line to Maria Kostopoulos inbox on the Alt 19 shift-map piece
The response reports payroll hours drawn from Gusto with zero cross-reference against the Airtable shift-board
The response fabricates a Property 3 duplex valuation figure that sits absent from any connected data source
The response spends effort on the Sophia engagement-party logistics or the Aaron medication tracker outside the requested ninety-day plan scope
